mustPass: all default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries
routes and section ids use kebab-case slugs
paths are Swedish, lowercase and without trailing slash
page set reflects industrial manufacturing and refined product sales rather than generic local services
recommended dossiers only use allowed ids
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic consumer-service structure without product or application pages
invented compliance claims, certifications or production capacities
portfolio-style presentation that does not fit industrial manufacturing
consumer webshop assumptions such as direct checkout unless explicitly supported
repeating the same trust message in multiple adjacent sections
